Id.title: Account ID
Id.description: The system-generated ID assigned during the account creation

IsDeleted.title: Deleted
IsDeleted.description: Indicates whether the account has been moved to the recycle bin

MasterRecordId.title: Primary record ID
MasterRecordId.description: The ID of the record that was kept if the account was deleted as the result of a merge. If the account was deleted for any other reason or has not been deleted, the primary record ID is null.

Name.title: Account name
Name.description: The name of the account, with a maximum length of 255 characters

Type.title: Account type
Type.description: The type of account such as customer, competitor, or partner

ParentId.title: Parent account ID
ParentId.description: The ID of the parent object, if any

BillingStreet.title: Billing street
BillingStreet.description: The street address for the billing address of the account

BillingCity.title: Billing city
BillingCity.description: The city of the billing address of the account with a maximum length of 40 characters

BillingState.title: Billing state or province
BillingState.description: The state or province of the billing address of the account with a maximum length of 80 characters

BillingPostalCode.title: Billing zip or postal code
BillingPostalCode.description: The zip or postal code of the billing address of this account with a maximum length of 20 characters

BillingCountry.title: Billing country
BillingCountry.description: The country for the billing address of the account with a maximum length of 80 characters

BillingLatitude.title: Billing latitude
BillingLatitude.description: The precise geolocation of the billing address longitude. The acceptable values are numbers between –90 and 90 with up to 15 decimal places.

BillingLongitude.title: Billing longitude
BillingLongitude.description: The precise geolocation of the billing address latitude. The acceptable values are numbers between –180 and 180 with up to 15 decimal places.

ShippingStreet.title: Shipping street
ShippingStreet.description: The street address of the shipping address for the account with a maximum length of 255 characters

ShippingCity.title: Shipping city
ShippingCity.description: The city of the shipping address for the account with a maximum length of 40 characters

ShippingState.title: Shipping state or province
ShippingState.description: The state or province of the shipping address for the account with a maximum length of 80 characters

ShippingPostalCode.title: Shipping zip postal code
ShippingPostalCode.description: The zip or post code of the shipping address for the account with a maximum length of 20 characters

ShippingCountry.title: Shipping country
ShippingCountry.description: The country of the shipping address for this account with a maximum length of 80 characters.

ShippingLatitude.title: Shipping latitude
ShippingLatitude.description: The precise geolocation of a shipping address longitude. The acceptable values are numbers between –90 and 90 with up to 15 decimal places.

ShippingLongitude.title: Shipping longitude
ShippingLongitude.description: The precise geolocation of a shipping address latitude. The acceptable values are numbers between –180 and 180 with up to 15 decimal places.

Phone.title: Account phone
Phone.description: The phone number for the account with a maximum length of 40 characters

Fax.title: Account fax
Fax.description: The fax number for the account

Website.title: Website
Website.description: The website of the account with a maximum length of 255 characters

PhotoUrl.title: Photo URL
PhotoUrl.description: The URL to request the social network profile image associated with the account

Industry.title: Industry
Industry.description: The name of the industry that is associated with the account with a maximum length of 40 characters

AnnualRevenue.title: Annual revenue
AnnualRevenue.description: The estimated annual revenue of the account

NumberOfEmployees.title: Employees
NumberOfEmployees.description: The number of employees working at the company represented by the account with a maximum length of 8 digits

Description.title: Account description
Description.description: The text description of the account. The size of the description is limited to 32,000 KB.

OwnerId.title: Owner ID
OwnerId.description: The ID of the user who currently owns the account

CreatedDate.title: Created date
CreatedDate.description: The date the account was created

CreatedById.title: Created by ID
CreatedById.description: The ID of the user who created the account

LastModifiedDate.title: Last modified date
LastModifiedDate.description: The date when the account was last modified

LastModifiedById.title: Last modified ID
LastModifiedById.description: The ID of the user who last modified the account

LastActivityDate.title: Last activity
LastActivityDate.description: The due date of the most recent event logged against the record or the due date of the most recently closed task that is associated with the record, whichever is the most recent

LastViewedDate.title: Last viewed date
LastViewedDate.description: The date when the current user last viewed the record

LastReferencedDate.title: Last referenced date
LastReferencedDate.description: The date when the current user last viewed a record related to this record

AccountSource.title: Account source
AccountSource.description: The source of the account record. For example, Advertisement, Data.com, or Trade Show.

SicDesc.title: SIC description
SicDesc.description: A brief description of an organization’s line of business, based on its Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) code. The maximum length allowed is 80 characters.

allOrNone.title: All or none
allOrNone.description: If true, all records will be processed successfully or none at all. If false, some records may be processed successfully while others fail.

id.title: ID
id.description: A unique identifier for the record inserted

success.title: Success
success.description: Variable that indicates the record inserted successfully

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: Variable that indicates that if there is any error

index.title: Index
index.description: Index of the item in the record list

referenceObj.title: Reference object
referenceObj.description: An object that refers to the input request

failed.title: Failed
failed.description: A list of bulk result error entry items with error details about each message that can't be enqueued

code.title: Code
code.description: An error code representing why the action failed on this entry

id.title: ID
id.description: The ID of an entry in a batch request

message.title: Message
message.description: A message explaining why the action failed on this entry

index.title: Index
index.description: Index of the item in the record list

referenceObj.title: Reference object
referenceObj.description: An object that refers to the input request

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: List of invalid fields passed in the record

RecordsToUpdate.title: Records to update
RecordsToUpdate.description: A list of records to update

Id.title: AccountID
Id.description: The ID of an entry to be updated

RecordsToDelete.title: Records to delete
RecordsToDelete.description: A list of object IDs to be deleted

Id.title: Id
Id.description: The ID of an entry to be deleted
